hooks.command:
echo 'CONTEXTE VERONE (post-compaction):
- LIRE EN PREMIER: .claude/work/ACTIVE.md (taches en cours) + .claude/INDEX.md (sommaire complet)
- Monorepo: back-office (3000), linkme (3002), site-internet (3001)
- LinkMe = plateforme affiliation B2B2C. SELECTIONS = coeur du revenu
- Explorer AVANT coder: schema DB + code existant + CLAUDE.md app + Serena memories
- UNE entite = UNE page detail (jamais de doublons entre canaux)
- JAMAIS commit/push/PR sans ordre explicite de Romeo
- Context7 MCP pour docs librairies, Serena MCP pour navigation code, Supabase MCP pour DB'

bash -c 'BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown"); if [ "$BRANCH" = "main" ] || [ "$BRANCH" = "master" ]; then echo "BLOQUE: Operation d ecriture INTERDITE sur main." >&2; echo "Solution : Creer une feature branch." >&2; exit 2; fi'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat 2>/dev/null || echo ""); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty" 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$CMD" ]; then CMD="${TOOL_INPUT:-}"; fi; if [ -n "$CMD" ] && ! echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "\[(BO|LM|WEB|SI|NO|INFRA)-[A-Z0-9]+-[0-9]{3}\]|\[NO-TASK\]|\[INFRA\]"; then echo "BLOQUE: Task ID manquant. Format: [APP-XXX-001] ou [NO-TASK]" >&2; exit 2; fi'

PreToolUse.matcher: Bash(gh pr create*) || Bash(gh pr merge*)

hooks.command: echo 'MIDDLEWARE CRITIQUE - Verifier patterns existants avant modification' && exit 0
echo 'RLS CRITIQUE - Approbation requise pour migrations auth' && exit 0

bash -c 'FILE_PATH=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r ".file_path // empty"); if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE "apps/back-office/"; then timeout 15 pnpm --filter @verone/back-office type-check 2>&1 | head -30 || true; elif echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE "apps/linkme/"; then timeout 15 pnpm --filter @verone/linkme type-check 2>&1 | head -30 || true; elif echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE "apps/site-internet/"; then timeout 15 pnpm --filter @verone/site-internet type-check 2>&1 | head -30 || true; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'CHANGED=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -cE "\.(tsx)$" || echo 0); if [ "$CHANGED" -gt 3 ]; then echo "Rappel: $CHANGED composants modifies - verifier visuellement avec Playwright MCP apres commit."; fi; $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/scripts/cleanup-active-tasks.sh; exit 0'
